channel.title: Pregnancy Toolkits — Your Pregnancy Companion
channel.description: Free pregnancy tracker with 33+ smart tools: due date calculator, kick counter, contraction timer, baby growth tracker, AI meal planner & more.

item.title: Due Date Calculator — Estimate Your Baby's Arrival
item.description: Calculate your estimated due date based on your last menstrual period or IVF transfer date. Free, accurate, and easy to use.
item.dc:creator: Pregnancy Toolkits

item.title: Baby Kick Counter — Track Baby Movements
item.description: Follow your baby's kick patterns with our free kick counter. Track movements, get daily counts, and monitor activity patterns.
item.dc:creator: Pregnancy Toolkits

item.title: Contraction Timer — Track Labor Contractions
item.description: Time your contractions accurately. Track frequency, duration, and intensity to know when it's time to head to the hospital.
item.dc:creator: Pregnancy Toolkits

item.title: AI Pregnancy Assistant — 24/7 Answers
item.description: Ask any pregnancy question and get evidence-based answers from our AI assistant. Available 24/7 in 7 languages.
item.dc:creator: Pregnancy Toolkits

item.title: Cycle & Ovulation Tracker — Predict Your Fertile Window
item.description: Track your menstrual cycle, predict ovulation, and identify your fertile window with AI-powered insights.
item.dc:creator: Pregnancy Toolkits

item.title: Baby Development Guide — Week by Week
item.description: Follow your baby's week-by-week development with size comparisons and developmental milestones from week 4 to 42.
item.dc:creator: Pregnancy Toolkits

item.title: AI Meal Planner — Safe Pregnancy Nutrition
item.description: Get personalized meal suggestions safe for pregnancy. AI-powered recommendations based on your trimester and dietary needs.
item.dc:creator: Pregnancy Toolkits

item.title: Pregnancy Weight Gain Tracker
item.description: Monitor healthy pregnancy weight gain with BMI-based guidelines. Track your progress and get personalized recommendations.
item.dc:creator: Pregnancy Toolkits

item.title: AI Birth Plan Generator
item.description: Generate a detailed, customizable birth plan with AI. Cover labor preferences, comfort options, and postpartum wishes.
item.dc:creator: Pregnancy Toolkits

item.title: AI Fitness Coach — Safe Pregnancy Exercises
item.description: Get trimester-specific workout plans designed for pregnant women. AI-powered fitness guidance with safety alerts.
item.dc:creator: Pregnancy Toolkits

item.title: Smart Pregnancy Plan — Personalized Guide
item.description: Get a personalized pregnancy plan tailored to your health profile, trimester, and goals. AI-powered week-by-week recommendations.
item.dc:creator: Pregnancy Toolkits

item.title: Baby Cry Translator — Understand Your Baby
item.description: AI-powered baby cry analysis. Understand what your baby is trying to tell you with intelligent sound pattern recognition.
item.dc:creator: Pregnancy Toolkits

item.title: Postpartum Recovery Guide
item.description: 6-week wellness guide for postpartum recovery. Track healing milestones, emotional wellness, and get evidence-based tips.
item.dc:creator: Pregnancy Toolkits

item.title: Fertility Academy — Complete Conception Guide
item.description: Learn everything about fertility, ovulation, and conception. Expert-reviewed educational content for trying to conceive.
item.dc:creator: Pregnancy Toolkits

item.title: Baby Sleep Tracker
item.description: Track your baby's sleep patterns, naps, and nighttime sleep. Get AI insights to improve your baby's sleep routine.
item.dc:creator: Pregnancy Toolkits
